title: Empty BLIF Model Name SegFault
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

The issue seems to happen when reading a BLIF file with a model with no name.
For example, the following incomplete BLIF file:
```
.model
```

To recreate, please run: 
```
echo .model > example.blif
yosys -p read_blif example.blif 
```

## Expected behavior

A warning or error message should be issued about model with no name, segmentation fault should be avoided.

## Actual behavior

When run with the current master version of Yosys, this produces a segmentation fault.
```
Segmentation fault: 11
```

Instrumenting Yosys with the Address Sanitizer and Undefined Behavior Sanitizer provides some more insight:
```
terminate called after throwing an instance of 'std::logic_error'
  what():  basic_string::_M_construct null not valid
Aborted (core dumped)
```
code_blocks:
terminate called after throwing an instance of 'std::logic_error'
  what():  basic_string::_M_construct null not valid
Aborted (core dumped)
